content: Multiple 2024-2026 papers predict DED bead/track geometry (width, height, angle) from thermal/process data using both classical gradient-boosted trees (Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost - CatBoost R2>0.95) and CNN-BiLSTM spatio-temporal networks on IR-camera images, confirming both a feature-engineering+GBM path and a deep spatio-temporal path are proven for this exact target variable (track width).
